name: Dread Allegiance
description:
Choose one of the Dead Three—Bane, Bhaal, or Myrkul. You gain resistance to a specific damage type and the ability to cast a cantrip, as detailed below; Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for this cantrip. When you finish a Long Rest, you can change your choice.

Bane: Psychic resistance; Minor Illusion cantrip.
Bhaal: Poison resistance; Blade Ward cantrip.
Myrkul: Necrotic resistance; Chill Touch cantrip.
